race.description: Become A Brc Member Class 3 Handicap
race.comment: SILENT CALL (1) grows a leg for hoop Newman who has two wins from as many steers and again gets the benefit of his 3kg claim. Has only missed a drum once in four spins over this distance range and should be right there when the whips are cracking. AMAHNI'S GIRL (4) strips fitter second-up from the break and will appreciate the step-up in trip here. Expect a positive showing. MELTDOWN (2) has put back-to-back wins together and is racing with a lot of confidence of late. One of the main contenders. DON'TCHA THINK (6) has gotten better with each run this time in work and looks to be building up to another victory. In the mix. AIRSWING (5) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
